titles.title: Spirit of God Come Fill Me

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All of my life I live for my own Trying to make myself known, But I found out That it's not the way We live Cause you have the better Plan to Give

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I empty myself before your throne Longing to hear your word Let me stay always like A desperate man Hungry and thirsty to Jesus I run

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Spirit of God come fill me, Spirit of God come fill me now, Spirit of God come fill me, Until I overflow and touch the world.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I am willing to pay the price Setting aside my comfort and pride Dying to self just to gain my Christ And to live by grace you provide
